## Your question

Be as specific as you can. "How do I X?" is usually answerable; "what's the
right way to think about Y?" gets a better answer if you include what you've
already tried.

## What you've already checked

- [ ] [`README.md`](../../README.md)
- [ ] `ask help` (and topic pages: `ask help workflow`, `ask help mcp`, etc.)
- [ ] [`docs/brief.md`](../../docs/brief.md) (design rationale)
- [ ] [`docs/spec.md`](../../docs/spec.md) (implementation contract)

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish? What does your project layout look like?
Versions, OS, MCP client if relevant.
